name: Spaghetti Marco Polo
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the walnuts, black olives, pimientos, and parsley in a large bowl. Mix thoroughly.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Add the chopped basil and toss lightly.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds, then remove from heat.
4. Add the cooked spaghetti to the skillet. Toss gently to combine.
5. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste. Mix thoroughly.
6. Serve the spaghetti topped with the walnut mixture and grated parmesan cheese.
